name: Welcome To The Backrooms
short_description: Welcome to the Backrooms is a indie horror game developed by Brickmade Productions. This game will bring you the ultimate Backrooms survival experience, crafting, lore, entities, and a very in-depth health system which will keep you checking your watch non-stop.
detailed_description:
Welcome To The Backrooms


The halls stretch onward into infinity, segmented by elevators, paths, and walls. You found yourself here after tumbling through your door. Whatever you were doing before, it is no consequence now. Explore your new surroundings, seek out the lost pages and words of those that came here before, or perhaps even after you. Craft a future for yourself in this place. Hope beyond hope that the noises you hear on the outside of your hastily constructed camp come from within your own mind. Survive the Backrooms, an infinite liminal space in which you are alone. Above all else, never lose your way, your mind, or your sense of self to the madness of your own senses.

Features:

  • THIS GAME IS CURRENTLY IN EARLY ACCESS AND WE WILL BE HAVING LOADS MORE UPDATES IN THE FUTURE.
  • In depth player health system including: Sanity, Thirst, Stamina, Heartrate, Enhanced Blood System, and Body Temperature.
  • Infinite, procedurally generated levels with fully random entity encounters. Sandbox open world.
  • Crude crafting system and Building system to allow you to protect yourself from the horrors of the Backrooms.
  • Random lore to uncover in your journey through the backrooms.
